notes: After downloading the mentioned movie fix and copying it to the movie folder, the game works fine in Proton with WineD3D. If you use PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% as a launch option the game works with D9VK (DX9 to Vulkan translation), but there a graphical glitches all over the screen. Tested on Plasma Wayland.
